subject: fix(mobile): enable drag-up from content area to expand bottom sheet
body:
Content-area touches were only promoted to sheet drags when at scroll
top and pulling down. Now also promotes when scrolled to bottom and
pulling up, allowing users to expand the sheet by dragging up on
content. Resets startSnapVh on promotion for correct snap direction.

Tags: mobile, ux, bottom-sheet, touch
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-layout
Semver: patch
